title: ventilago cristata
intro: Ventilago cristata, also known as the scented ironwood or scented iron-wood, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ventilago cristata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
